description.lostinfinity.jei.ingots: Ingots can be forged through the Ingot refinery within Nonexistence.
description.lostinfinity.jei.ingots.kyvo: Created by right-clicking the Meta Materializer with a Clovinite Power Bank while a Vellorium Ingot, Kylaxium Ingot, and Xerovium Ingot is in the closest box, an Organic Plate, Corrupted Root, and Giant Tentacle in the middle box, as well as a sacrifice of 3 mobs or a single player in the farthest box.
description.lostinfinity.jei.ingots.bios: Created by right-clicking the Meta Materializer with an Adhesive Fibre while an Olysium Ingot, Detherium Ingot, and Phytrosium Ingot is in the closest box, a Gloom Bulb, Pickle, and Anthocite in the middle box, as well as a sacrifice of 3 mobs or a single player in the farthest box.
description.lostinfinity.jei.ingots.mali: Created by right-clicking the Meta Materializer with an External Clovinite Battery while a Noxerium Ingot, Incadium Ingot, and Emberium Ingot is in the closest box, a Ghostly Husk, Flexible Husk, and Corrupted Root in the middle box, as well as a sacrifice of 3 mobs or a single player in the farthest box.
description.lostinfinity.jei.ingots.ethe: Created by right-clicking the Meta Materializer with an Ion Cell while an Olysium Ingot, Xerovium Ingot, and Detherium Ingot is in the closest box, a Photochromic Husk, Ghostly Husk, and Luminescent Stingers in the middle box, as well as a sacrifice of 3 mobs or a single player in the farthest box.
description.lostinfinity.jei.ingots.pola: Created by right-clicking the Meta Materializer with a Potent Polarcronite while a Xerovium Ingot, Phytrosium Ingot, and Hextorium Ingot is in the closest box, a Volatile Blood, Glowing Globes, and Glowing Organ in the middle box, as well as a sacrifice of 3 mobs or a single player in the farthest box.
description.lostinfinity.jei.machines.ge: Must have a Combustion Engine powered next to it. Connect gears to each other where they are each touching (not overlapping)
description.lostinfinity.jei.machines.co: Found within Nonexistence, system must be unclogged periodically with Carbonic Acid to compress ores
description.lostinfinity.jei.machines.gr: Using an active Gearbox next to it, grinds down Sunstone by cleaning the "soot" off without touching the red box in the center
description.lostinfinity.jei.machines.en: Used to Power a Gearbox using Spark Plugs
description.lostinfinity.jei.machines.fu: Complete the crafting by making a 2x2 of the same block using the pieces provided on the bottom left. Filling the board without completing a square will lead to a full reset of crafting progress
description.lostinfinity.jei.machines.ir: Portal opens when an Inter-dimensional Rift Generator is found 30 blocks away in the Cardinal directions of a center placed Inter-Dimensional Rift Generator, and Eterno Cells are inserted.
description.lostinfinity.jei.chemistrycl: Crafted by dropping 5 Darksteel Shards, 5 Elastic Tissue, and 5 Super-Mutated Crystals in a 2x2 pool of Concentrated Acid, then right-clicking the Concentrated Acid pool with a Colixium Catenation Pouch.
Crafted by dropping 5 Auradine, 5 Space Pickle, and 5 Super-Mutated Pelt in a 2x2 pool of Concentrated Acid, then right-clicking the Concentrated Acid pool with a Phoroxium Catenation Pouch.
Crafted by dropping 5 Incandescite, 5 Glow Bulb, and 5 Organic Fuse in a 2x2 pool of Concentrated Acid, then right-clicking the Concentrated Acid pool with a Laraxium Catenation Pouch.
description.lostinfinity.jei.minigames: Obtained by right-clicking the (minigame) starter block with (item used) and winning the mini-game
description.lostinfinity.jei.minigames.m: Obtained by right-clicking the Blue Labyrinth Game starter block with Deviant String and winning the mini-game in the Top Labyrinth
Obtained by right-clicking the Blue Labyrinth Game starter block with a Perfect Pearl and winning the mini-game in the Top Labyrinth
Obtained by right-clicking the Blue Labyrinth Game starter block with Deviant Gunpowder and winning the mini-game in the Top Labyrinth
Obtained by right-clicking the Blue Labyrinth Game starter block with a Deviant Bear Hide and winning the mini-game in the Top Labyrinth
Obtained by right-clicking the Blue Labyrinth Game starter block with a Reflective Shard and winning the mini-game in the Top Labyrinth
Obtained by right-clicking the Blue Labyrinth Game starter block with a Deviant Ghast Tear and winning the mini-game in the Top Labyrinth
Obtained by right-clicking the Yellow Labyrinth Game starter block with a Deviant Blaze Rod and winning the mini-game in the Top Labyrinth
Obtained by right-clicking the Yellow Labyrinth Game starter block with a Deviant Snowball and winning the mini-game in the Top Labyrinth
Obtained by right-clicking the Purple Labyrinth Game starter block with Deviant Flesh and winning the mini-game in the Top Labyrinth
Obtained by right-clicking the Purple Labyrinth Game starter block with a Deviant Mushroom and winning the mini-game in the Top Labyrinth
Obtained by right-clicking the Item Game starter block with a Webbed Idol and winning the mini-game in the Top Labyrinth
Obtained by right-clicking the Item Game starter block with a Relic of The Mirage and winning the mini-game in the Top Labyrinth
Obtained by right-clicking the Item Game starter block with a Conductive Bar and winning the mini-game in the Top Labyrinth
Obtained by right-clicking the Item Game starter block with a Jar of Blood and winning the mini-game in the Top Labyrinth
Obtained by right-clicking the Item Game starter block with a Frosted Log and winning the mini-game in the Top Labyrinth
description.lostinfinity.jei.minigames.i: Obtained by right-clicking the Puzzle Key with a Beacon Key and defeating the Puzzle Master in the Bottom Labyrinth
description.lostinfinity.jei.minigames.m: Obtained by right-clicking the Navigation Device block with a Basic Sextant and winning the mini-game in the Bottom Labyrinth
description.lostinfinity.jei.minigames.b: Obtained by right-clicking the Circuit Calibrator starter block with a Time Trigger and winning the mini-game in the Bottom Labyrinth
description.lostinfinity.jei.minigames.a: Obtained by right-clicking the Melodic Sequencer starter block with a Blank Optical Disc and winning the mini-game in the Bottom Labyrinth
description.lostinfinity.jei.minigames.d: Obtained by right-clicking the Polymerization Device block with a Full Rainfall Collector and winning the mini-game in the Bottom Labyrinth
description.lostinfinity.jei.minigames.m: Obtained by right-clicking the Timeline Stablizer block with Advanced Synchronizer and winning the mini-game in the Middle Labyrinth
description.lostinfinity.jei.minigames.a: Obtained by right-clicking the Row Slide starter block with a Holotron Disc and winning the mini-game in the Middle Labyrinth
description.lostinfinity.jei.minigames.s: Obtained by right-clicking the Space-Time Synchronizer starter block with a Time Trigger and winning the mini-game in the Middle Labyrinth
description.lostinfinity.jei.minigames.p: Obtained by right-clicking the Power Condenser starter block with a Reinforced Blade and winning the mini-game in the Middle Labyrinth
description.lostinfinity.jei.minigames.h: Obtained by right-clicking the Block Ring Game starter block with High Tolerance Wire and winning the mini-game in the Middle Labyrinth
description.lostinfinity.jei.minigames.r: Obtained by right-clicking the Ion Converter starter block with an Ion Cell and winning the mini-game in the Middle Labyrinth
description.lostinfinity.jei.minigames.o: Obtained by right-clicking the Light Tile Game starter block and winning the mini-game then using a Supercharged Cell on the High Powered Charger in the Middle Labyrinth
description.lostinfinity.jei.minigames.e: Obtained by right-clicking the Emberstar Charger starter block with an Unpowered Emberstar and winning the mini-game using Electrified Quartz in the Top Labyrinth
description.lostinfinity.jei.minigames.g: Obtained by right-clicking the Geolocator Core starter block with a Geolocation Orb and winning the mini-game in the Top Labyrinth
Obtained by right-clicking the Geolocator Core starter block with a Deviant Globe and winning the mini-game in the Top Labyrinth
description.lostinfinity.jei.minigames.s: Obtained by right-clicking the Star Crystal Memory Game starter block with an Unpowered Starcrystal and winning the mini-game using Electrified Quartz in the Top Labyrinth
description.lostinfinity.jei.minigames.g: Obtained by right-clicking the Redirection Chamber Game starter block with a Geo-Coordinated Orb and winning the mini-game by turning all arrows red in the Middle Labyrinth
description.lostinfinity.jei.minigames.m: Obtained by right-clicking the Power Condenser starter block with 4 Clovenite Power Banks and winning the mini-game in the Middle Labyrinth
description.lostinfinity.jei.minigames.p: Obtained by right-clicking the Power Conduit starter block with a Blank Optical Disc and winning the mini-game in Nonexistence
Obtained by right-clicking the Power Collider starter block with a Charge Cell and winning the mini-game in Nonexistence
description.lostinfinity.jei.minigames.n: Obtained by right-clicking the Pipe Game starter block with 10 Florocite and winning the mini-game in Nonexistence
Obtained by right-clicking the Jet Pack and winning the mini-game in The Infinite Murk
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.gasfil: Throw and Unstable Balloon in the air and continue to bounce it up without it hitting the ground a total of 8 times
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.lifesy: Use Effigy Doll on a player then throw the doll into lava
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.gianth: Use Pulse Charge on a Leviathan then slay it
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.claysu: Use Clay Terraformer on Sea Clay, then change modes and place blocks in the chosen pattern
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.plasma: Kill a player between the beams of a connected Plasma Emitter and Plasma Receiver
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.voidal: Use Rapid Tunneling Device on a player or Dimensional Trader while within the Infinite Murk
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.astral: Place down a Nebulous Beacon and protect it while it charges
Use Scroll of Reconstruction on 6 different Whispers and defeat the boss
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.reconf: Use the Matter Recombiner within the Infinite Murk
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.organi: Place Fish Chow, right-click it, and follow the fish until the item drops
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.veloci: Use Rocket Strapped Explosive on a player in the Overworld or a Dimensional Trader within the End
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.magicc: Use Silver Tokens on Treasure Hunter and finish their challenge
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.chewed: Kill an entity by bringing a Skyre nearby with a Beacon of Darkness and right-clicking an entity with it to get the Skyre to attack them
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.hearto: Transport Wisp from the Radiant Tree to the Lumino Tree in Nonexistence and click it with a Lightbinder
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.aligne: Create a 4x4 of Rift Entangled Tile in the Overworld, then switch to the Infinite Murk and right-click the same Rift Entangled Tiles with a Power Analyzer
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.murkyc: Give a Grubber a Jar of Murky Syrup
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.voidsp: Use Vacuum Container on a Void Flower in the Infinite Murk then use an Elastic Thread to connect the block to an entity
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.voidfl: Grow a Moon Flower in the Overworld, it will become a Void Flower in the Infinite Murk
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.branch: Transport Wisp from the Radiant Orange Tree to the Rebirth Blue Tree
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.electr: Right-Click Main Power Terminal Block within Nonexistence and complete the given Blueprints and return them to the block
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.crushe: Crush an entity under The Crusher
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.toxics: Throw Spike Balls at Galaxy Vine Spore
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.darkwo: Right-Click an Eye Battery in Nonexistence with 5 Organic Wire, 10 Organic Plate, 20 Gloominessence Cubes, and 3 Basic Storage Chip, and right-click the Eye Battery again
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.floroc: Find Lumcubes in the Luminessence area of Nonexistence and right-click them with a bio-energiser
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.hearto: Transport Wisp from Light to Darkness and right-click with the Darkbinder next to the Archlum Logs
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.mutant: Click Fungus with Bio-Corruption Powder and have a Screecher hit it
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.knifei: Click the Knife Icon, and defeat the Galaxy Spire in the Nonexistence Boss Room
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.swordi: Click the Sword Icon, and defeat the Galaxy Spire in the Nonexistence Boss Room
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.bombin: Click the Bomb Icon, and defeat the Galaxy Spire in the Nonexistence Boss Room
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.warped: Use Geo-Coorelator to find Traveller 3 times and then kill it
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.clovin: Use External Clovinite Battery on Hyper Generator, throw 10 Clovinite Power Bank and 20 Electron Recycler into the Hyper Melder
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.explos: Collect Goo thrown at you by a Hurler with a bottle
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.essenc: Activate Idol in Nonexistence with Illumination Stone
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.acidbu: Collect Concentrated Acid in Nonexistence near Mossy Astro Rock
description.lostinfinity.jei.misc.eterno: Charge Unpowered Cells in Nonexistence using the Cell Charger block
description.lostinfinity.jei.unknown.eth: Grow an Etherstock up by right-clicking the top of the stock with Magic Biopowder until it becomes an Ether Flower
description.lostinfinity.jei.unknown.lif: Right-Click another player with a Super-Charged Injection and slay them
description.lostinfinity.jei.unknown.rad: Obtained by charging a Radion Pillar and right-clicking it
description.lostinfinity.jei.unknown.fos: Use a Fossil Finder to discover these fossils within the Shadow Sea
description.lostinfinity.jei.unknown.scr: Given to you when you lower a Screamer's total lives
description.lostinfinity.jei.unknown.tra: Obtained by right-clicking the Ancient Symbol Interpreter with a Magical Book and winning the mini-game in the Labyrinth
description.lostinfinity.jei.unknown.ant: Find Blightcubes in the Luminessence area of Nonexistence and right-click them with a bio-energiser
description.lostinfinity.jei.unknown.wat: Throw Spike Balls at the corresponding Colored Tentacle Eyes
description.lostinfinity.jei.unknown.fir: Use Heat-Resistant Tongs on a Flutterfyre
description.lostinfinity.jei.unknown.con: Right-Click a Acidback that has been Poisoned with a Glass Bottle
description.lostinfinity.jei.unknown.cur: Formed when a Deviant with Skull Shot strikes an Emerald Ore block
description.lostinfinity.jei.unknown.dro: Data of Droid death given based on the vanilla world it died in or if it was fighting a Deviant
description.lostinfinity.jei.unknown.sup: Formed when a Deviant Ghast's fireball strikes an Iron Ore block
description.lostinfinity.jei.unknown.sta: Randomly given by Dimensional Trader when trading Deviant Egg, Deviant Beef, Deviant Milk, or Deviant Porkchop
